lines.english: Many beings take incarnation.
Many winds, fires and waters.
Many Indras stand at the Lord's Door. ||3||
Many jewels, and oceans of butter and milk.
Many gods and goddesses of so many kinds. ||4||
Many suns, moons and stars.
Many miraculous Elysian trees, many Krishnas playing the flute.
Many Akaashic ethers, many nether regions of the underworld.
Many earths, many wish-fulfilling cows.
Many mouths chant and meditate on the Lord. ||5||
Many ways in which we speak.
Many Shaastras, Simritees and Puraanas.
Many listeners listen to the Lord of Treasure.
Many righteous judges of Dharma, many gods of wealth.
The Lord God totally permeates all beings. ||6||
Many gods of water, many mountains of gold.
Many thousand-headed snakes, chanting ever-new Names of God.
They do not know the limits of the Supreme Lord God. ||7||
Many forms, colors and celestial realms.
Many gardens, many fruits and roots.
Many solar systems, many galaxies.
Many apocalypses, many creations.
Many ages, days and nights.
He Himself is mind, and He Himself is matter. ||8||
The Lord is perfectly pervading all places. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਜੀਅ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: anik jeea jaa ke grih maeh |
lines.english: Many beings are in His home.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਮਾਇਆ ਜਾ ਕੀ ਲਖੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: anik maaeaa jaa kee lakhee na jaae |
lines.english: Many Mayas, which cannot be known.
Many exquisite melodies sing of the Lord.
Many are the ways in which our Sovereign Lord plays.
Many recording scribes of the conscious and subconscious are revealed there. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਤੇ ਊਚ ਭਗਤ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ॥
lines.translit: sabh te aooch bhagat jaa kai sang |
lines.english: He is above all, and yet He dwells with His devotees.
Many unstruck melodies resound and resonate with bliss.
Twenty-four hours a day, they sing His Praises with love.
True is the Primal Being, and True is His dwelling.
He is the Highest of the high, Immaculate and Detached, in Nirvaanaa.

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਆ ਰਸ ਕਾ ਕਛੁ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਪਾਰ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: auaa ras kaa kachh ant na paar |11|
lines.english: There is no end or limit of that sublime essence. ||11||
He Himself pervades each and every heart.
He alone knows His handiwork.
The Merciful Lord is the Treasure of Compassion, O Nanak.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਪਿਆ ਨਾਨਕ ਤੇ ਭਏ ਨਿਹਾਲ ॥੧੨॥੧॥੨॥੨॥੩॥੭॥
lines.translit: jin japiaa naanak te bhe nihaal |12|1|2|2|3|7|
lines.english: Those who chant and meditate on Him, O Nanak, are exalted and enraptured. ||12||1||2||2||3||7||
Saarang, Chhant, Fifth Mehl:
One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:
See the Giver of fearlessness in all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਪੂਰਨੁ ਕਰਿ ਬਿਸਥੀਰਨੁ ਜਲ ਤਰੰਗ ਜਿਉ ਰਚਨੁ ਕੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt pooran kar bisatheeran jal tarang jiau rachan keea |
lines.english: Like waves in the water, He created the creation.
The Detached Lord is totally permeating each and every heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਭਿ ਰਸ ਮਾਣੇ ਭੋਗ ਘਟਾਣੇ ਆਨ ਨ ਬੀਆ ਕੋ ਥੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: habh ras maane bhog ghattaane aan na beea ko theea |
lines.english: He enjoys all tastes, and takes pleasure in all hearts. There is no other like Him at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੀ ਇਕ ਰੰਗੀ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: har rangee ik rangee tthaakur santasang prabh jaataa |
lines.english: The color of the Lord's Love is the one color of our Lord and Master; in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, God is realized.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਸਿ ਲੀਨਾ ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਮੀਨਾ ਸਭ ਦੇਖੀਐ ਅਨਭੈ ਕਾ ਦਾਤਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak daras leenaa jiau jal meenaa sabh dekheeai anabhai kaa daataa |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, I am drenched with the Blessed Vision of the Lord, like the fish in the water. I see the Giver of fearlessness in all. ||1||
What praises should I give, and what approval should I offer to Him?

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਨ ਮਨਮੋਹਨ ਘਟ ਘਟ ਸੋਹਨ ਜਬ ਖਿੰਚੈ ਤਬ ਛਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: pooran manamohan ghatt ghatt sohan jab khinchai tab chhaaee |
lines.english: The Perfect Enticing Lord adorns each and every heart. When He withdraws, the mortal turns to dust.
The Perfect Lord is totally pervading and permeating all places.
